channel.title: Jmap on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Jmap on Arrans github.io

item.title: stalwartlabs/mail-server
item.description: Secure & Modern All-in-One Mail Server (IMAP, JMAP, POP3, SMTP)

item.title: linagora/tmail-flutter
item.description: A multi-platform (Flutter) application for reading your emails, with your favorite devices, using the JMAP protocol!
